steps.description: Click the "Add (+)" button in the notification bar at the top of the Microsoft Teams browser interface.
Type the URL 'https://localhost:53000/tabs/home' into the Chrome browser's address bar on a new tab.
Press the "Enter" key to navigate to the highlighted URL ("https://localhost:53000/tabs/home") in Chrome's address bar.
Click the "Advanced" button on the "Your connection is not private" warning page in Google Chrome browser.
Click the "Proceed to localhost (unsafe)" link on the Chrome privacy error page to bypass the security warning.
Click the browser tab labeled "(2) vscuse_app..." at the top left of the Google Chrome window to switch focus from the "Home" tab.
Click the red plus (+) button in the Microsoft Teams web app interface to add a new item or perform an add action within the "vscuse_app_RDJh3local" tab.
Click the "Reload app" option in the dropdown menu of the vscuse_app_RDJh3local tab within Microsoft Teams Web, indicated by the circular arrow icon.
Click the "Allow" button on the teams.microsoft.com permission popup in the Chrome browser to grant network access.
@assertion there's message "Your app is running in TeamsModern" exist.
